title: task overview CB
excerpt: Überfällig Heute Morgen In den nächsten 7 Tagen Ohne Datum Ohne Zuweisung Anderen zugewiesen
markdown:
###### Überfällig
```tasks
not done
path includes tasks
sort by priority
due before today
is not blocked
show tree
short mode
tags include #SH
limit 10
```

###### Heute
```tasks
not done
path includes tasks
sort by priority
due today
is not blocked
show tree
limit 10
tags include #SH
short mode
```

###### Morgen
```tasks
not done
path includes tasks
sort by priority
due tomorrow
is not blocked
show tree
limit 10
tags include #SH
short mode
```


###### In den nächsten 7 Tagen
```tasks
not done
path includes tasks
sort by priority
due after tomorrow
due before in 7 days
is not blocked
show tree
limit 10
tags include #SH
short mode
```



###### Ohne Datum
```tasks
not done
path includes tasks
sort by priority
no due date
is not blocked
show tree
short mode
tags include #SH
```


###### Ohne Zuweisung
```tasks
not done
path includes tasks
sort by priority
is not blocked
show tree
short mode
no tags
```



###### Anderen zugewiesen
```tasks
not done
path includes tasks
group by tags
sort by priority
is not blocked
show tree
short mode
has tags
tags do not include #SH
```
